name: detectors: naked-throw.sh exits 1 when `throw "message"` or `throw new Error("...")` is used without a typed error class from the taxonomy (g-node-002)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "throw new Error(\"bad\");\n" > src/x.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/naked-throw.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.js"
